diagrams.title: Inference Rules Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between Modus Ponens, Modus Tollens, Universal Instantiation, and Existential Instantiation
elements: Arrows showing premise to conclusion flow
diagrams.purpose: Visual reference for core inference rules used in FOL reasoning

diagrams.title: Forward Chaining Process
diagrams.description: Data-driven reasoning flow from facts through rule matching to conclusions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how forward chaining works in rule-based systems

diagrams.title: Backward Chaining Process
diagrams.description: Goal-driven reasoning flow from goal to subgoals to facts
diagrams.purpose: Understanding recursive goal reduction in backward chaining

diagrams.title: Resolution Refutation Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process of proof by contradiction
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how resolution proves entailment through refutation

visuals.title: Knowledge Engineering In First Order Logic
visuals.description: Visual diagram for knowledge engineering in first order logic
